description_long: This bungalow features a single-story structure with a broad, low-pitched hip roof covered in gray shingles. The front facade includes a covered porch with wooden railings and posts, providing a welcoming entryway. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, contrasted by darker window frames and trim. Multiple windows are distributed around the building, with a symmetrical arrangement on the front and fewer on the sides and rear. The house sits on a rectangular green plot, with what appears to be signage or display boards on one side. The overall design is compact and functional, typical of suburban residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story bungalow with a hip roof, covered front porch, and light-colored exterior walls, set on a green rectangular plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entrance, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the hip roof and the porch's side railing.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal windows and a plain wall, showing the building's length.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the porch corner and roof overhang.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with fewer side and rear windows
